name: Flight Deck Grill & Golf Club
address: Lisa Maloff Wy, South Lake Tahoe, CA 96150
about: Flight Deck Grill & Golf Club offers a unique combination of an American grill and indoor golf simulators. Located beside the runway in South Lake Tahoe, the venue provides year-round virtual golf access on world-famous courses, along with a full-service restaurant and bar. It features driving range practice, multiplayer games, and a variety of party-friendly activities. The facility is designed for both casual dining and serious golf practice, with pricing structured as hourly bay reservations and a focus on accommodating groups and families.
why_golfers_like_it: Unique airport runway views provide an entertaining atmosphere while playing
Multi-sport simulators allow for golf and other activities like soccer and dodgeball
Year-round access to world-famous golf courses regardless of weather
Convenient on-site dining and bar for a complete experience

food_and_drink.notes: American grill classics with a full menu including wings, burgers, salads, and sandwiches. Family-friendly options available.
Craft cocktails and a full bar service available on-site.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify whether club rentals are available, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, the venue has its own kitchen and bar. Outside food and drinks are not permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: For a full 18-hole round, the venue recommends booking 45-60 minutes per person in your party.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Flight Deck Grill & Golf is family-friendly, with a special kids' menu mentioned and activities suitable for children.
